blocks.title: Overview
blocks.code: (async()=>{const h=ctx.React.createElement;const{Statistic,Row,Col}=ctx.antd;const qs={KPI_QUERIES};const vs=[];for(const q of qs){const r=await ctx.api.request({url:'{COLLECTION}:list',params:{paginate:false,filter:q.f}});vs.push(r?.data?.data?.length||0)}ctx.render(h(Row,{gutter:16,style:{padding:'8px 0'}},qs.map((q,i)=>h(Col,{span:Math.floor(24/qs.length),key:i},h(Statistic,{title:q.t,value:vs[i],valueStyle:{color:q.c,fontSize:28}})))))})();
